## Description
Provide a summary of the changes made and the motivation/context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New component (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Local build (`pnpm build` runs successfully)
- [ ] Type safety check (`pnpm typecheck` returns no errors)
- [ ] Component renders correctly in dark mode and is fully responsive

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines (Tailwind CSS v4 styling rules)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
